title: rubus horridulus
intro: Rubus horridulus, also known as the thorny bramble, is a type of plant species that belongs to the Rubus genus. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to treat various health issues due to its high content of antioxidants and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Rubus horridulus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and even exhibit anticancer properties. In herbal preparations, Rubus horridulus is often used to create teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
